exercises.title: Describe in Cylindrical
exercises.content: A point is 3m from the center axis, at 120° angle, 5m above the base. Write its cylindrical coordinates (r, θ, z).

exercises.title: Cylindrical vs Other
exercises.content: For spiral staircase, tornado, rotating machinery—which system (Cartesian, cylindrical) is best? Why?
hints: All have rotation/symmetry around an axis
